creator: peo@intersonic.se
text:
Yes, lots of /usr/local/include/qFoo.h, caused by my trying to keep apps
from KDE3 on the systems I suppose.

My problem is that I have not been able to find proper replacements for
Konsole, KWrite, KCalc, although I know Qt3 and KDE3 is going in the bin
now. As KDE4 is out of the question I switched to Xfce but still use the
apps mentioned.

If there is no way to compile Qt4-corelibs without removing the Qt3
stuff I guess I have to step back and try to figure out how to survice
without the KDE3 apps.

Thank you for pointing this out.

//per
